zh.lifeSummary: 當Meurig ap Llewelyn於大約1440年出生在威爾士安格萊波多文時，他的父親Owen ap Hwlkin22歲，母親Margery verch Ieuan Lloyd of Denbighshire16歲。他於1469年與Miss ferch Jenkin在英國威爾斯安格萊波迪德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1538年11月30日在英國威爾斯安格萊享年99歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Meurig ap Llewelyn于大约1440年出生在威尔士安格萊波多文时，他的父亲Owen ap Hwlkin22岁，母亲Margery verch Ieuan Lloyd of Denbighshire16岁。他于1469年与Miss ferch Jenkin在英国威尔斯安格萊波迪德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1538年11月30日在英国威尔斯安格萊享年99岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Llewelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Meurig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Mauricius via Old Welsh Mouric. See Maurice .

variants.name: Meuric
meanings: From Latin Mauricius via Old Welsh Mouric. See Maurice .

en.lifeSummary: When Meurig ap Llewelyn was born about 1440, in Bodowen, Anglesey, Wales, his father, Owen ap Hwlkin, was 22 and his mother, Margery verch Ieuan Lloyd of Denbighshire, was 16. He married Miss ferch Jenkin in 1469, in Bodedern, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 30 November 1538, in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 99.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Meurig ap Llewelyn est né environ 1440, à Bodowen, Anglesey, Galles, son père, Owen ap Hwlkin, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margery verch Ieuan Lloyd of Denbighshire, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Miss ferch Jenkin en 1469, à Bodedern, Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 30 novembre 1538, à Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 99 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Meurig ap Llewelyn um 1440 in Bodowen, Anglesey, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Owen ap Hwlkin 22 und seine Mutter Margery verch Ieuan Lloyd of Denbighshire 16. Er hat 1469 in Bodedern, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom Miss ferch Jenkin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 30. November 1538 im Alter von 99 Jahren in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Meurig ap Llewelyn è nato il circa 1440 nel Bodowen, Anglesey, Galles, il suo padre, Owen ap Hwlkin, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Margery verch Ieuan Lloyd of Denbighshire, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Miss ferch Jenkin nel 1469, nel Bodedern, Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 30 novembre 1538, nel Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 99 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Meurig ap Llewelynが約1440年にウェールズアングレセイボドウンで生まれた時，父Owen ap Hwlkinは22歳，母Margery verch Ieuan Lloyd of Denbighshireは16歳であった。1469年にイギリスウェールズアングレセイボデデルンでMiss ferch Jenkinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1538年11月30日にイギリスウェールズアングレセイで99歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Meurig ap Llewelyn(이)가 대략 1440년 웨일스 앤글레시 보다웬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Owen ap Hwlkin(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery verch Ieuan Lloyd of Denbighshire(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1469년 영국 웨일스 앤글레시 보데더에서 Miss ferch Jenkin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1538년 11월 30일 영국 웨일스 앤글레시에서 99세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Meurig ap Llewelyn nasceu aproximadamente 1440, em Bodowen, Anglesey, Gales, seu pai, Owen ap Hwlkin, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margery verch Ieuan Lloyd of Denbighshire, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Miss ferch Jenkin em 1469, em Bodedern, Anglesey, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 30 de novembro de 1538, em Anglesey, Gales, United Kingdom, com 99 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Meurig ap Llewelyn родился около 1440 г. в местности бодоуэн, англеси, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Owen ap Hwlkin было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margery verch Ieuan Lloyd of Denbighshire, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Miss ferch Jenkin в 1469 г. в местности бодедирн, англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 30 ноября 1538 г. в местности англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 99 лет.

es.Prysaeddfed,Bodedern,Anglesey,Wales: Bodedern, Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Meurig ap Llewelyn nació aproximadamente 1440, en Bodowen, Isla Oscura, Gales, su papá, Owen ap Hwlkin, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margery verch Ieuan Lloyd of Denbighshire, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Miss ferch Jenkin en 1469, en Bodedern, Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 30 de noviembre de 1538, en Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 99 años.
